name: 1992 The Taster
description: Single Cask, Cask Strength, Limited Edition (The Taster series)

name: Blue Label
description: Premium blended Scotch whisky with no age statement; consists of rare old malts and grain whiskies

name: Blue Label (Xordinaire)
description: Blend released 2023 (Xordinaire series), French XO Cognac cask influence suggested; no official age statement

name: 18‑Year‑Old
description: Standard Bowmore 18‑Year‑Old matured in bourbon & sherry casks, balanced peat smoke and sherried sweetness

name: 18‑Year‑Old Deep & Complex
description: Oloroso & Pedro Ximénez sherry cask matured Islay single malt Scotch whisky; balanced sherry and peat character

name: 2010 Trail & Tale
description: Bottled by WhiskyNavi (WhNa) in the Trail & Tale series; finished in ex‑Laphroaig barrique; single cask, natural colour, non‑chill filtered

name: 25‑Year‑Old
description: Triple Distilled – Three Cask Matured; aged in bourbon, oloroso sherry & virgin oak casks; travel retail exclusive, uncoloured & non‑chill filtered

name: Malting Season (Second Edition)
description: Annual series bottling celebrating BenRiach’s floor‑malted barley; malted on‑site, matured in first‑fill bourbon barrels; label shows barley variety Concerto (Second Edition)

name: Surge
description: Travel retail exclusive single malt from Skye; matured in ex‑bourbon casks with signature maritime smoke and spice character

name: 25‑Year‑Old
description: Classic Talisker 25‑year‑old single malt from the Isle of Skye, matured at least 25 years; rich maritime smoke, peat and sea salt character

name: 21‑Year‑Old (Seann Chreag)
description: Limited edition bottling from Ardbeg’s Seann Chreag series; matured 21 years in Oloroso sherry & bourbon casks, non‑chill filtered

name: 15‑Year‑Old (Anthology)
description: Ardbeg Anthology – The Beithir’s Tale series; matured for 15 years in special designer charred bourbon casks; non‑chill filtered

name: Ode to the Valley
description: Part of The Master's Anthology series, matured in a combination of ruby port casks from the Douro Valley and Spanish sherry casks, offering sweet floral and ripe berry description

name: Ode to the Embers
description: Part of The Master's Anthology series; lightly peated Highland single malt matured in Oloroso & Pedro Ximénez sherry casks with interwoven smoky and rich sherried character

name: Ode to the Dark
description: Part of The Master's Anthology series, matured exclusively in Pedro Ximénez sherry casks with rich dark fruit, chocolate, mocha and caramel character
